title: Basic event signing round-trip
description: A single event signed and verified should produce valid=true
clause: GA-01-REQ-01: All events MUST be signed with HMAC-SHA256

title: Empty secret is rejected
description: Signing with an empty string must raise SigningError
clause: GA-01-REQ-02: Empty signing keys MUST be rejected

title: Verification with wrong key fails
description: verify() with a different key must return False
clause: GA-01-REQ-03: Verification with a non-matching key MUST return false
